Juraj Slafkovsky's hat trick lifts Canadiens to 4-3 overtime win over the Lightning in Game 1
Canadiens' Juraj Slafkovsky completes hat trick in OT, stuns Lightning
Canadiens’ Juraj Slafkovsky stuns Lightning with feat not seen before in Habs history
Canadiens' Juraj Slafkovsky completes hat trick in OT, stuns Lightning
Canadiens' Juraj Slafkovsky scores 3, including OT, to top Lightning
Slafkovsky’s hat trick lifts Montreal

items.summary: The Montreal Canadiens stunned the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-3 in Game 1 of their Eastern Conference first-round series, with Juraj Slafkovsky scoring a hat-trick, including the game-winner 1:22 into overtime. Slafkovsky's goals were all scored on the power play, making him the first Montreal player to record a hat trick in the Stanley Cup playoffs since Rene Bourque in 2014. The win gives the Canadiens home-ice advantage in the best-of-seven series.

Bruins give up 4 3rd-period goals, fall to Sabres 4-3 in playoff opener

items.summary: The Buffalo Sabres overcame a two-goal deficit in the final eight minutes to beat the Boston Bruins 4-3 in their first playoff game in 15 years. Mattias Samuelson scored the winning goal with 3:24 left in the game. The Sabres scored four goals in the third period to secure the comeback victory.

items.title: Louisiana father kills 7 of his children plus another child in mass shooting at house, police say
items.text_preview: SHREVEPORT, La. -- A Louisiana father fatally shot eight children, including seven of his own, in an attack on his family Sunday morning that stretched across two houses in a Shreveport neighborhood...

supporting_articles.title: Man kills 7 of his children plus another child in shooting in Louisiana neighborhood
Man kills 8 children in U.S. Louisiana, 7 his own
Man kills 8 children in Shreveport, Louisiana, shooting
Louisiana father kills 7 of his children plus another child in mass shooting at house, police say

items.summary: A 31-year-old Louisiana father, Shamar Elkins, fatally shot eight children, including seven of his own, and critically wounded two women, including his wife, in a mass shooting at two houses in a Shreveport neighborhood. The children, ranging in age from 3 to 11, were killed in the same house, with one found dead on the roof and another surviving after jumping off. Elkins died after a police pursuit, with authorities describing the incident as a domestic violence case.

items.summary: The Arizona Lottery has announced the results for Sunday, April 19, 2026, with the winning Pick 3 numbers and Fantasy 5 numbers being 05-11-21-25-40. The winning Triple Twist numbers were also released as 11-22-23-25-27-32. For those who want to play Powerball, drawings are held on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Saturdays at 7:59 p.m. Arizona time.

items.title: U.S. kills three in latest military strike on a suspected drug boat
items.text_preview: April 20 (UPI) -- The U.S. military announced late Sunday that it has killed three men in its latest strike targeting a suspected drug-smuggling boat in the Caribbean. Seventeen people have been...

supporting_articles.title: U.S. military strike on alleged drug boat kills 3 in the Caribbean
Strike on alleged drug boat kills 3 in Caribbean Sea, U.S. military says
U.S. kills three in latest military strike on a suspected drug boat
Another boat strike kills 3 in the Caribbean

items.summary: The US military has killed three men in a strike targeting a suspected drug-smuggling boat in the Caribbean, bringing the total number of people killed in six recent strikes to 17. The strike, which occurred on Sunday, was carried out by the US Southern Command against a boat operated by a designated terrorist organization. Since the first strike on September 2, the US military has killed at least 180 people and destroyed 55 boats in over 50 strikes.
